UPSTREAM_URL.description: Optional HTTP or HTTPS origin that GreenGateway should proxy when no gateway-owned route matches. Leave blank to deploy only `/health`, `/version`, `/metrics`, `/admin`, and MCP/control-plane routes first.

GATEWAY_PUBLIC_URL.description: Optional public URL for this deployed gateway, such as `https://greengateway.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev`. Set this after the first deploy if you use MCP OAuth protected-resource metadata.

AUTH_PROVIDERS.description: Optional GreenGateway auth provider JSON. Use this for OIDC/JWT/cookie-session auth configuration; keep embedded client secrets in Worker secrets rather than public commits.

JWT_JWKS_URL.description: Optional JWKS URL for the legacy single-provider JWT validator.

JWT_ISSUER.description: Optional expected JWT issuer for the legacy single-provider JWT validator.

JWT_AUDIENCE.description: Optional expected JWT audience for the legacy single-provider JWT validator.
